_comment: Single source of truth for the site. Edit items here (or via the importer) and run `node scripts/build.js`. Generated HTML is never edited by hand. Rename 'items'/'groups' and fields to fit your niche, but keep slug/name/group/value/reported/source/blurb.

items.name: Example Item
items.blurb: One sentence describing the item, used on its page.
